expectations.text: The answer starts with ID discovery using current user and transaction account listing before detail calls.
expectations.evidence: It starts with generic preflight and resource discovery, but does not name current-user or transaction-account discovery.

expectations.text: The answer includes a feed freshness gate before treating the monthly close as final.
expectations.evidence: No feed status/freshness gate is described.

expectations.text: The answer includes explicit delegation triggers for truncated outputs or many ambiguous transactions.
expectations.evidence: It handles truncation by narrowing queries, but does not delegate truncated outputs or ambiguous transaction triage.

expectations.text: The answer says not to edit the note until metrics are stable or the user asks for a provisional entry.
expectations.evidence: Lines 39-40 say to draft the close separately and update the note only after numbers are verified.
